backend/main.mo: Defines pagination utilities and core parish data types including sacraments, family members, parishioners, localities, and budget transactions.
feature_evidence.json: Contains feature evidence reports linking dashboard anniversary filtering and PDF export updates to specific frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides short summaries of major frontend components and pages, highlighting their functionality and integration with backend types and features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles with OKLCH color variables defining light and dark themes and global UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: Simple HTML root file loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component handling authentication, profile setup flow, theming, and layout rendering.
frontend/src/components/BudgetDialog.tsx: Form dialog for creating and editing budget transactions with fields for type, amount, date, category, and description.
frontend/src/components/CollectiveOfferi: Dialog for adding or editing collective locality offerings with date picker, amount, description, and nanosecond timestamp handling.
frontend/src/components/EventDialog.tsx: Dialog for creating or editing an event, including title, date, description, and task management.
frontend/src/components/FunctionAssignme: Dialog to add or edit a parish function assignment with title, description, address, and contact list editing.
frontend/src/components/FunctionLocality: Dialog for managing locality-based function assignments with fields for name, description, and editable contact list.
frontend/src/components/IndividualOfferi: Dialog for creating or editing an individual offering, handling amount, date selection, description, and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/LetterDialog.tsx: Dialog for creating or editing a letter, managing title, body, and displaying letter metadata when editing.
frontend/src/components/LocalityDialog.t: Dialog to add or edit a locality with fields for contact info and a list of tasks.
frontend/src/components/MainLayout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with sidebar navigation and renders sections based on user selection, handling logout and theme switching.
frontend/src/components/NoteDialog.tsx: Dialog for creating or editing notes, managing form state and saving note data.
frontend/src/components/ParishionerDialo: Dialog for creating or editing parishioner records, including family members and individual offerings with backend integration.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting new users to enter name and role and saves the profile via backend mutation.
Dialog for adding or editing statistical entries with date and numeric fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, login flow, and stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines many React Query hooks for fetching and mutating parish-related backend data, including parishioners, user profiles, events, finances, and assignments. Provides typed wrappers around actor methods with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets global Tailwind layers and CSS variables for light and dark themes, configuring colors, radii, and base styles.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Creates branded HTML-based PDFs with header, quote, content, and footer, styled for printing and parish use. Exposes a function generating and triggering a printable document.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/Budzet.tsx: Implements the budget management page with monthly and yearly transaction views, pagination, CRUD dialogs, and PDF export. Uses multiple query hooks to fetch and modify financial records.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders the dashboard with totals, sacrament counts, events, and anniversaries using aggregated query data. Supports filtering anniversaries and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/FunkcjeParafialne.tsx: Manages parish function assignments with pagination, editing, deletion, and PDF export. Uses dialogs and multiple query hooks to modify both individual and locality assignments.
frontend/src/pages/Kartoteka.tsx: Parishioner list page with pagination, search, CRUD dialogs, and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/Korespondencja.tsx: Letter management page supporting search, CRUD operations, sorting, and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login screen using Internet Identity with branding and simple UI.
frontend/src/pages/Miejscowosci.tsx: Localities management page with parishioner listings, collective offerings, pagination, CRUD, and PDF export.
frontend/src/pages/Statystyki.tsx: Statistics page that aggregates parishioner data, supports CRUD for stat entries, and exports summaries to PDF.
frontend/src/pages/Uwagi.tsx: Parish notes management page with CRUD operations and PDF export of all notes.
frontend/src/pages/Wydarzenia.tsx: React page for listing, paginating, creating, editing, deleting, and exporting events to PDF with dialogs and sorting of upcoming/past events.
frontend/src/utils/anniversaries.ts: Utility functions for computing parishioner anniversary summaries and formatting anniversary data for display or PDF export.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters and session-stored values, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, animations, container settings, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing the parish management system, its features, schema version, and existing functional modules.
